page_metadata.biotools__summary: Open-source tool for host contamination removal. It offers a one-step option for genome indexing.  The tool employs a variety of well-known mapping, classification, and alignment methods to classify reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Open-source tool for host contamination removal. It offers a one-step option for genome indexing.  The tool employs a variety of well-known mapping, classification, and alignment methods to classify reads.
